deferred_items.proposed_title: Observe-mode session process start-identity capture skip
deferred_items.reason: FR-BGSTAB-009 AC-2 conflict — AC-2 unconditionally requires best-effort OS start identity capture for every new session at PTY spawn, but skipping the call whenever processCleanup.mode is observe (the current default) would eliminate that capture for effectively all sessions. Requires an explicit user/SRS decision (relax/condition AC-2, or drop the observe-skip sub-requirement). Not registered per team-lead instruction (user decision pending).

open_questions.question: Bounded-parallel shutdown termination concurrency limit: maximum number of owned-session terminations to run concurrently during the bounded owned-session termination stage of graceful shutdown.

Session-count-scaled shutdown cleanup timeout: value or formula to replace the fixed DEFAULT_SESSION_CLEANUP_TIMEOUT_MS=3000 (server/src/services/gracefulShutdown.ts:11), scaled to owned-session count for 54-session-scale shutdown.

scope_doc_edits.reason: Section did not exist; created at end of file (after §4 Requirements) to register OQ-1 and OQ-2 as [NEEDS-USER] items referenced by REL-BGSTAB-005 {{OQ-1}}/{{OQ-2}} placeholders. Only §6 prose was added; no §4 requirement blocks, §2 tables, or per-requirement sections were edited by hand.

deviations.reason: This speckiwi instance rejects "proposed" as an invalid status (SRS-E005 raised on first attempt with PERF-BGSTAB-001). The valid earliest lifecycle status for a newly authored, not-yet-implemented requirement in this repo is "planned" (matches OBS-BGSTAB-001/002, authored the same way). Factual correction prioritized over the literal instruction; PERF-BGSTAB-001 was corrected via update_status.

deviations.issue: PERF-BGSTAB-001 acceptance criteria carry a duplicated "AC-N:" prefix
deviations.detail: For PERF-BGSTAB-001 only, the acceptanceCriteria strings were submitted with a leading "AC-1: " prefix; add_requirement auto-prefixes the AC id, so the rendered markdown reads "- [ ] AC-1: AC-1: Given ...". validate_spec does NOT flag this (0 errors); the parsed AC id is clean ("AC-1") and text is intact. No MCP or speckiwi CLI tool can edit AC text or delete a requirement, and §4 hand-editing is forbidden by G1, so this cosmetic duplication could not be safely remediated. All other five requirements omit the prefix and render correctly. Recommended follow-up: correct PERF-BGSTAB-001 AC text via an authorized SRS maintenance path.
